title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Nature's Basket

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Nature's Basket
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Nature's Basket is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Nature's Basket:
Godrej Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Nature's Basket!
